description.ko: 음파가 복잡한 기하학적 패턴과 유동적인 시각적 메아리로 변모하는 과정을 탐구하는 몰입형 디지털 아트 작품입니다.
description.en: An immersive digital art piece exploring the metamorphosis of sound waves into intricate geometric patterns and fluid visual echoes.

prompt: A high-tech digital art installation titled ECHO-0, visualizing complex sound waves as 3D holographic structures, fluid neon light trails, and cymatic patterns, dark cinematic atmosphere, pulsating energy spheres, macro perspective, 8k resolution, ethereal lighting, obsidian background
